narrative:
Precinct Sylvania City 5 (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,211 registered voters, with 48.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.9%, a modest Republican lean of 5.7 percentage points.
